name: io.github.benzatkulak-collab/social-perks
description: Autonomous customer-marketing platform for small businesses. Pays customers a small perk to post about a business across 15 social platforms (Instagram, TikTok, Google reviews, Facebook, X, etc.). Tools let AI agents create campaigns, review submissions, and recommend pricing.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Optional. Bearer <api-key> for tenant-scoped mutations (createCampaign, submitProof, reviewSubmission, etc.). Anonymous calls work for read-only tools.
